summary: W880 exposes the W879 boundary source-pi-zero selected-row direct-localization boundary at the product-facing surface. The bounded-derived bridge now names closed-map and closed-embedding W879 inputs as StablePackage providers and proves they are definitionally the canonical direct-localization boundary package. OriginalFourTaskProductData now has matching closed-map and closed-embedding constructors, direct-localization equality theorems, and projections for bounded-derived, metrizable exact category, and Yoneda Ext fields. This advances the original four-task contract surface but does not construct a nullary positive witness.
obligations_discharged: The W879 closed-map selected-row direct-localization boundary is now exposed as a BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage.
The W879 closed-embedding selected-row direct-localization boundary is now exposed as a BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage.
OriginalFourTaskProductData can now be assembled directly from the W879 closed-map and closed-embedding selected-row boundary inputs.
The product-data constructors prove equality back to the canonical direct-localization boundary bridge and expose bounded-derived, metrizable exact category, and Yoneda Ext projections.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: A caller with W879 selected-row boundary data no longer has to manually route through the lower-level direct-localization stable package to obtain OriginalFourTaskProductData.
The required-declaration audit now covers the W879 StablePackage bridge and the matching OriginalFourTaskProductData bridge.
The product-facing bridge keeps W879 as a source obligation instead of introducing a route-ledger-only success claim.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.

The original four-task contract is not complete because the W879 product-data constructors still require caller-supplied W735 branch data, selected-W461 provider data, and row-aware WPP-op provider data.
A concrete nullary W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch record is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WppOpSelectedW461ProviderW781 value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary WppOpClosedMapRowsProviderW781 or WppOpClosedEmbeddingRowsProviderW781 value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
remaining_work: Construct concrete nullary W735 branch data or a stronger route that eliminates that branch input.
Construct concrete nullary selected-W461 and row-aware WPP-op provider data, or replace them with a stronger nullary colimit-stability theorem.
Use concrete source data plus direct-left-calculus and source-triangulation evidence to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
verified_commands: jq -r '.packages[] | select(.name=="mathlib" or .name=="aesop" or .name=="Qq" or .name=="batteries" or .name=="Cli") | [.name,.inputRev,.rev] | @tsv' lake-manifest.json
